title: Enterprise Network Design & Deployment — 850 Employees
summary: Led end-to-end planning of a 3-tier hierarchical network: Cisco Catalyst switches, ISR routers and FortiGate NGFW. Built 8+ VLANs, 802.1Q trunks, DHCP scopes and inter-VLAN routing — achieving near-zero downtime and full department isolation.

title: CCTV Deployment & Maintenance — 16+ Outlets
summary: Led end-to-end installation of CCTV systems across 16 retail outlets — designed layouts, configured IP cameras/NVRs and integrated with the network. Preventive maintenance kept systems at 95% uptime, delivered on time and within budget.

title: Self-Hosted Website & Web Application
summary: Built and self-hosted a website and web application using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Go and PostgreSQL on Ubuntu Linux, with Let's Encrypt for TLS — managing secure public and private access for reliability and scalability.
